Class GraduateStudent

java.lang.Object
kbtu.model.user.User
kbtu.model.user.Student
kbtu.model.user.GraduateStudent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Researcher
public class GraduateStudent extends Student implements Researcher
A graduate student (Master or PhD). 4th-year+ students can be assigned a research supervisor who must have h-index >= 3. Graduate students also implement Researcher.
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • setSupervisor

      public void setSupervisor(Researcher supervisor) throws LowHIndexException
      Assigns a supervisor. The supervisor's h-index must be >= 3.
      Throws:
      LowHIndexException - if supervisor's h-index < 3
